label: Pose Transfer (SD1.5 IPAdapter + OpenPose)
description: Action/pose transfer: take the subject's appearance from image[0] (via IPAdapter) and re-pose it to image[1] (via the native SDPose parser → OpenPose ControlNet). Output size comes from the stage resolution/aspect. Tune: IPAdapter weight on the Apply IPAdapter node (higher = stronger subject identity), ControlNet strength on the Apply ControlNet node, and the prompt. Models: DreamShaper_8 (SD1.5), control_v11p_sd15_openpose_fp16, sdpose_wholebody_fp16, ip-adapter-plus_sd15, clip_vision_h (CLIP-ViT-H).

image.error: Pose Transfer needs a subject image — wire the original into the stage's image[0] input.
Pose Transfer needs an action-reference image — wire a pose reference into the stage's image[1] input.

text.default: a person, best quality, highly detailed, sharp focus
